title: Maisie Was a Lady
writer: Elizabeth Reinhardt, Mary C. McCall Jr., Myles Connolly
actors: Ann Sothern, Lew Ayres, Maureen O'Sullivan
plot: Showgirl Maisie Ravier finds herself once again out of work. She meets a wealthy playboy who hires her to be his family's new maid. Maisie soon finds herself trying to mend the family's many problems.
